title: Elph AI provider configuration
description: One provider per JSON file in ~/.elph/providers. The provider id is the filename without .json. Toggle availability with elph provider enable/disable and elph provider model enable/disable.

enabled.description: When false, the provider and all of its models are hidden from the model picker and default selection.

name.description: Display name shown in the UI.

apiKey.description: API key literal, $ENV_VAR / ${ENV_VAR} / env.ENV_VAR interpolation, or !command.

authHeader.description: Add Authorization: Bearer <apiKey> header for OpenAI-compatible APIs.

headers.description: Extra request headers. Values support $ENV_VAR, ${ENV_VAR}, env.ENV_VAR, and !command syntax.

oneOf.description: Provider-specific thinking value (for example high, adaptive, budget token count).
Marks the level as unsupported for this model.

thinkingLevelMap.description: Maps Elph thinking levels to provider values. Omit a key to use defaults; set null to hide an unsupported level.

id.description: Model identifier sent to the upstream API.

enabled.description: When false, the model is hidden from the model picker and default selection.

name.description: Human-readable model name. Defaults to id.

api.description: Override provider api for this model.

baseUrl.description: Override provider baseUrl for this model.

reasoning.description: Whether the model supports extended thinking.

contextWindow.description: Maximum context window size in tokens for this model.

maxTokens.description: Maximum output tokens per completion for this model.

temperature.description: Sampling temperature. 0.4 is the default for coding agents (more deterministic, still flexible).

topP.description: Nucleus sampling cutoff (top_p). Default 1 keeps the full token pool so temperature controls randomness; use 0.9–0.95 for stricter outputs.

cost.description: Per-million-token pricing used for usage display.

headers.description: Per-model request headers merged over provider headers.

supportsDeveloperRole.description: Use developer role instead of system for OpenAI-compatible APIs when thinking is enabled.

supportsReasoningEffort.description: Send reasoning_effort for OpenAI-style reasoning models.

supportsUsageInStreaming.description: Request include_usage in streaming OpenAI-compatible responses.

allowEmptySignature.description: Allow empty thinking signatures in Anthropic responses.

thinkingFormat.description: Wire format for extended thinking on OpenAI-compatible APIs.

maxTokensField.description: Request field name for output token limit.
